questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to CPU Schedulers?
options: Inefficient scaling of Long-term, medium-term, and short-term scheduler algorithms selection.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Long-term, medium-term, and short-term scheduler algorithms selection.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Long-term, medium-term, and short-term scheduler algorithms selection scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
